description: Wait until a selector satisfies running, terminated, or count=N.

all_namespaces.description: Bypass namespace scoping and read across all namespaces.

for.description: Condition to wait for: running, terminated, or count=N.

namespace.description: Namespace slug to scope this read. Overrides the caller session namespace fallback.

selector.description:
Session selector used for matching sessions to observe.

Grammar:
  all
  <uuid>
  id:<uuid>
  role:<name>
  namespace:<slug>
  dir:<path>
  label:<key>=<value>
  label:<key> in (v1, v2)
Examples:
  all
  019e44f9-...
  role:engineer
  namespace:default
  dir:/tmp/project
  label:app=nginx
  "label:app in (web, api)"

timeout_secs.description: Seconds to wait before timing out. Defaults to 30.

name: wait
